name: Chicken...
description: A chicken.. thats it, just a chicken, it shoots eggs I guess but thats it

moves.name: Egg scrambler
moves.desc: A egg shoots out of the chicken, doesn't do much 8-12 dmg but it can confuse

moves.name: peck
moves.desc: The chicken pecks you, it could hit your eye and that might hurt a bit

moves.name: grains
moves.desc: helps your stats but doesn't heal

moves.name: ❤‍🔥🔥 spontaneously combust 🔥❤‍🔥
moves.desc: nooo chickenn 😭 the chicken spontaneously combusts burning anything it touches

moves.name: rapid egg scrambles
moves.desc: shoots out three eggs quickly, also adds statdwn for accuracy
